title: GUILTY GEAR Xrd -REVELATOR-

notes: Requires Proton 3.7-8 to run properly; later versions either introduce visual bugs or prevent the game from launching at all. Intro and Gallery videos do not play, and online multiplayer is either non-functional or too sparsely populated for me to find a match during testing. Otherwise performance is good and single player and local multiplayer modes are perfectly playable. Noted no issues with controller support.

title: GUILTY GEAR Xrd -REVELATOR-

notes:
Everything runs perfectly gameplay-wise, regardless of settings. Solidly locked to 60FPS. This includes fishing, figures, online, etc.
Replays also work as expected.
However, the one exception is that prerendered videos do not play, which may or may not interfere with the story in places (not tested)
